calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Gary Louie/ Room 304B; Clerk: JIRoque/NBautista; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Arnold Evje, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Mychal Collins, is present.
Attorney, Claire E. Shin, representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement the premises located on 440 Eddy Street, #307, San Francisco, CA 94109 , which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-02-2009 is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Off Calendar
